headline: How The S&P Global (SPGI) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Recalibrate AI And Valuation Risks
summary: The fair value estimate for S&P Global sits unchanged at US$537.90, signaling that this latest update is more about fine tuning than a reset of the story. That lines up with recent Street research, where many firms have trimmed or tightened price targets into the mid US$500s range while still largely keeping positive ratings in place. As you read on, you will see how these shifts fit into the broader analyst narrative and what to watch as new research comes through. Analyst Price Targets...

headline: How The Greenbrier Companies (GBX) Story Is Shifting On Earnings Quality And Valuation Hopes
summary: Greenbrier Companies is back in focus as some analysts lift price targets toward US$49, even as modelled fair value holds at US$49.67 per share. Higher targets, including a move to US$49, come alongside mixed reactions to recent EPS beats and the role of one time gains in the latest results. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets and differing views are shaping the current narrative around Greenbrier and what to watch next. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full...

headline: Jim Cramer Says He Would “Stick With Bank of America”
summary: Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer evaluated, along with the fragile food market.
